[size=60][b][color=gold]- TUTORIAL -[/color][/b][/size]
[b]#1.[/b] Choose a lane to drop a monster.
[b]#2.[/b] Join three monsters of the same color to match them.
[b]#3.[/b] You will win when you eliminate all the monsters.
[b]#4.[/b] But be careful. Not to let them escape to the right of the grid![/size]
